description: This file defines an interface for external credit bureau lookups and validations within the BusinessLoanAPI Spring Boot project. It abstracts the interaction with credit bureau services, supporting stub providers for testing and the potential addition of real providers later.

classes.name: CreditBureauClient
classes.description: An interface that declares a method for fetching credit reports from external credit bureaus, supporting different implementations such as stub or real providers.

methods.name: fetchReport
methods.description: Method to retrieve a credit bureau report based on a provided request object.
